skill: Systems of two linear equations in two variables
stem: At how many points do the graphs of the equations y = 2x + 9 and y = 5x intersect in the xy-plane?
rationale: The lines y = 2x + 9 and y = 5x have different slopes (2 and 5), so they intersect at exactly one point in the xy-plane. The correct answer is choice C.
